shipping.summary: Estimated delivery time after dispatch:USA : 1-2 business days, according to the final destinationCanada: 1-3 business days, according to the final destinationEurope – European Union – Standard Shipping: 2-6 business days, according to the final destinationEurope – European Union – Express Shipping: 1-2 business days for main destinations / 2-3 business days for remote areasEurope – Non-European Union – Express Shipping: 1-2 business days for main destinations / 2-3 business days for remote areasUnited Kingdom – Express Shipping: 1-2 business days for major cities / 2-3 business days for remote areasLatin America: 3-4 business daysAsia and the Middle East: 2-3 business daysAustralia and Oceania: 4-7 business days for main destinations / 6-9 business days for remote areasAfrica: 2-4 business daysLUISAVIAROMA cannot be held responsible for delays in shipments caused by weather conditions, international customs issues or any other circumstances beyond LUISAVIAROMA’s control.

tax.summary: By using another courier rather than the one provided by LUISAVIAROMA, the customer is responsible for all taxes and fees at the time of shipment, if/where applicable.Shipments of items returned to LUISAVIAROMA must originate from the same country of the original shipment.LUISAVIAROMA reserves the right not to accept items shipped with another courier rather than the one indicated in the email with the return/exchange instructions.

fee.summary: If authorized, shipping costs will be covered by LUISAVIAROMA.LUISAVIAROMA reserves the right to refuse applications for returns/exchanges that do not comply with all TERMS & CONDITIONS.In case of non-compliant returns, the merchandise will be returned to the customer at the shipping address specified in the original order, at the customer’s expense.If a non-compliant return is accepted, LUISAVIAROMA will deduct a 10% administrative/restocking fee from the refund.Customers’ right to withdrawal from contracts concluded on the LUISAVIAROMA website is waived in accordance with Article 59 of the Italian Consumer Code as regards to the following:The supply of sealed goods which are not suitable for return due to health protection or hygiene reasons and were unsealed after delivery.The supply of goods which are liable to deteriorate or expire rapidly.The supply of made-to-measure goods or clearly customized goods upon specific request of the customer.Customers’ right to withdrawal is waived for “special orders”, i.e., items which have been expressly ordered by LUISAVIAROMA specifically for the customer.The following is a non-exhaustive list of items ineligible for return:Expressly indicated items in the underwear/lingerie section.Expressly indicated items in the Beauty section.Christmas boxes.For each item ineligible for return, LUISAVIAROMA provides customers with an indication directly on the product information page.

result.overall_note: Local rule-based extraction from official policy pages.
